notes: High-volume US dog/cat brand; require official product catalog with ingredient statements, images, pet type, life stage, and recipe/flavor. The official sitemap currently yields 307 dog/cat food URLs after excluding non-product giving-back and discount pages, so the discovery cap must stay above the previous 250-row cutoff.

Treat as a dedicated line because shelf demand and variants are high. Discovery must isolate official single-formula dog/cat shop pages and exclude variety packs/starter kits; Pro Plan Veterinary Diet category pages do not expose formula-level ingredient evidence and require a separate official/authorized feed. Official page extraction can exceed the default extractor timeout on full-current runs, so this target uses the same long bounded extraction window as other high-variant Purina lines.

Cat wet-food line with many flavors; require official single-formula /cats/shop pages with flavor-level ingredient accuracy. Discovery excludes category, localized, treat, topper, broth, appetizer, and variety-pack URLs.

Require product-line/flavor-level ingredient and image verification. Use the canonical wellness-pet-company source even though page images are hosted by Salsify. The Salsify sitemap uses short formula slugs, so keep a lower minScore but exclude obvious treats, supplements, toppers, dental chews, value packs, and variety packs before extraction.
Cat wet/dry line with many flavors; require exact official single-formula ingredients. Discovery excludes category, treat, topper/complement, and variety-pack URLs.
Diet and breed formulas require exact product matching; official search index provides formula-level composition plus package EANs.
Require official product image and verified pet type for all shelf products; manufacturer pages expose formula evidence but not all retail GTINs.

Include Science Diet and Prescription Diet variants separately; exact formula matters. The official sitemap currently exposes 334 dog/cat food URLs, so imports must run in bounded 20-row windows with the 10s per-page delay instead of stopping at the earlier 240 URL cap.
Dedicated Purina line; require official single-formula variants and pet type. Discovery excludes category, treat/topper, supplement, starter-kit, and variety-pack URLs.

Dog Chow is a current US Purina shelf line. Official Purina Gatsby /dogs/shop formula pages expose product identity, front images, ingredients, GTINs, and AAFCO statements; category, localized, offer, FAQ, treat/topper, supplement, and variety-pack URLs stay out of extraction.

Puppy Chow is a current US Purina puppy-food shelf line. Official Purina /dogs/shop formula pages expose exact ingredient statements, front images, GTINs, and AAFCO/life-stage evidence; category, offer, FAQ, treat/topper, supplement, and variety-pack URLs stay excluded.

Moist & Meaty is a current US Purina dog-food shelf line with semi-moist pouch formulas. Official Purina /dogs/shop formula pages are the verification source for exact ingredients, front images, GTINs, and complete-food evidence; non-single-formula packs and non-food pages stay excluded.

ALPO is a current US Purina dog-food shelf line. Official Purina /dogs/shop pages provide formula identity, exact ingredients, front images, GTINs, and complete-food evidence; treat/topper, supplement, offer, FAQ, and variety-pack URLs stay out of verified extraction.
Official Drupal pages expose product identity, UPCs, images, and nutrition-panel images; ingredient statements require official label-image OCR and should be marked label_ocr_verified.
Official Drupal pages expose product identity, UPCs, images, and nutrition-panel images; ingredient statements require official label-image OCR and should be marked label_ocr_verified.

Freeze-dried/raw-adjacent product lines need exact recipe and format identification. Official Shopify products JSON exposes the current catalog; product pages expose exact ingredients and images while treats, toppers, bundles, and merch stay excluded by gates. Extraction may exceed the default 180s child timeout because page-level verification is required.

Mostly cat-focused shelf line; exact flavor and texture variants matter. Extraction may exceed the default 180s child timeout because each accepted formula needs page-level ingredient evidence.

Wet-food variants need exact flavor-level ingredients. Official Shopify products JSON exposes the broad current catalog across multiple pages; validator gates reject toys, treats, variety packs, bundles, and multi-formula rows before import. Dedicated Purina dog line; require official single-formula product pages. Discovery excludes category, treat/topper, supplement, and variety-pack URLs.

Require exact line/flavor product matching across wet and dry foods. Official Drupal shop pages expose product images, ingredient headings, and guaranteed-analysis sections; non-complete treats/toppers are intentionally skipped by import gates.

Dehydrated, wet, and whole-food formats need exact recipe matching. Official Shopify product sitemap and product JSON expose UPC/package variants and product images; official product pages expose Ingredients/Nutrition accordions.

Require line/flavor-level dog and cat products. Official WordPress product sitemap exposes product pages with exact Ingredients tab content, guaranteed analysis, calorie content, nutritional statements, and product images; robots disallow /wp-json/, so page HTML is the approved source. Product pages return 403 without trailing slashes, so discovery preserves slash-sensitive canonical URLs.

discovery.officialApi: Salesforce Commerce Cloud Search-UpdateGrid + official product pages

Require official product image and verified ingredient statements. The prior official discovery run hit the 180 URL cap exactly, so keep this ceiling high enough to exhaust current dog/cat collection pagination. Official product pages throttle bulk reads; keep a fetch delay so imports avoid avoidable 429 gaps. Extraction may exceed the default 180s child timeout because throttling-safe page delays are required.

Current US cat-food brand with official Shopify product feed. Import only single-formula complete cat foods with exact official ingredient statements and front package images; treats, toppers, variety packs, kits, and product pages missing ingredient evidence remain rejected by validation gates.
